question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Roland Garros Airport will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-02-15?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61980.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-02-15 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-02-09) was 27.250. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Roland Garros Airport.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - GILLOT-AEROPORT - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61980.D.
